key_fact: ABI platforms model, analyze and visualize data to support decision making and value creation
usable_for: Define competitive category and buyer expectations
notes: Useful to frame category, not to estimate SOM

key_fact: Global BI software market estimated USD 40.13B in 2025 and projected USD 81.45B by 2033
AI in manufacturing estimated USD 7.09B in 2025 and USD 47.88B by 2030, CAGR 46.5%
notes: High-growth signal but vendor/category boundary differs

key_fact: Industrial AI market reached USD 43.6B in 2024 and forecast USD 153.9B by 2030 at 23% CAGR
notes: Different scope than BI and AI manufacturing reports

key_fact: Deloitte says 80% of surveyed manufacturing executives plan to invest 20% or more of improvement budgets in smart manufacturing initiatives
usable_for: Support budget intent and smart manufacturing priority

key_fact: Survey of 600 executives focuses on smart factories, transformation complexity, operational risk and talent obstacles
usable_for: Identify buyer pain and adoption barriers
notes: Useful for risk and buyer objections

key_fact: Manufacturing COOs have high hopes and budgets for AI, but may underinvest in enablers needed for lasting value
usable_for: Support pilot-to-scale risk and need for enablers

key_fact: Report uses enterprise usage data and survey data to describe AI adoption and data analysis use cases
Power BI Pro listed at USD 14/user/month and Premium Per User at USD 24/user/month, paid yearly
Tableau Standard Viewer USD 15, Explorer USD 42, Creator USD 75 per user/month billed annually; Enterprise tiers higher
